reason: identifiers.py: baseline snapshot (module_size=121, max_complexity=4, avg_complexity=1.63) predates the committed state of the file at 80d8a18 (#299) -- the file was never edited after that commit (git log --follow shows a single introducing commit) so there is no debt to pay down, only a stale snapshot. The 12 non-blank lines and CC 4->5 delta come from ProgramName.__new__'s three independent path-traversal guards (empty, dot-component, separator) -- see docstring at identifiers.py:68-70. Corrected module_size, max_complexity, avg_complexity to match the already-merged file; all other metrics (method_ratio, encapsulation_ratio, avg_params, classes_per_module, class_to_func_ratio, violations, future_annotations) were already at parity and are untouched.

Lock in the claude_md.py decomposition (prior commit) that the baseline did not yet record. Tighten src/punt_vox/claude_md.py from its pre-split snapshot (module_size 379, classes_per_module 2, avg_complexity 2.55, avg_params 1.0) to the current post-split metrics (module_size 110, classes_per_module 1, avg_complexity 2.17, avg_params 0.83), and add first-time entries for the three extracted modules atomic_file.py (140), managed_section.py (121), markdown_fence.py (60) -- each clearing every OO threshold. Values are per-file oo_score.py output. Scoped to the 4 touched files; the 37 un-baselined voxd/programs/ modules are a separate pre-existing hygiene issue and are intentionally left alone (no blanket make update-oo).

Lock in the AtomicFile consolidation (prior commit) that the ratchet baseline did not record. keys_env.py delegated its hand-rolled atomic writer to AtomicFile: tighten from the pre-refactor snapshot (max_complexity 20, avg_complexity 10.5, module_size 140, avg_params 1.2) to current (6, 3.11, 108, 1.11). Lock atomic_file.py module_size 140->123 and filesystem_store.py module_size 156->151 (both improved by the consolidation). atomic_file.py avg_params (0.83) and avg_complexity (2.0) are left as set for the forced-mode parameter -- legitimately grown feature substance, already at current. Values are per-file oo_score.py output. Scoped to the 3 touched files; the 37 un-baselined voxd/programs/ modules are a separate hygiene issue, left alone (no blanket make update-oo).

atomic_file.py: the fdopen-failure cleanup path now wraps its temp unlink in contextlib.suppress(OSError) so a raising unlink can't mask the original os.fdopen error (parity with the main cleanup path). That fix and its explanatory comment add 3 non-blank lines (module_size 123->126); every other metric is unchanged. Scoped correction, not a blanket update-oo.

Reconcile the 29 previously-untracked voxd/programs/ modules into the OO baseline -- a baseline-completeness gap #307/#308 deliberately left alone (their scoped JSON-only lock-ins avoided a blanket update-oo that would have swept these in). Every one of the 29 clears every absolute OO threshold (module_size <= 300, max_complexity <= 10, method_ratio >= 0.8, class_to_func_ratio >= 0.5, encapsulation 1.0, zero init/public-attr violations, future annotations present) -- no debt is blessed; each is baselined at its shipped, already-clean values. Largest is service.py (module_size 268, max_complexity 6). Also drop the stale migrate.py entry: the file was deleted per the no-migration policy and no longer exists on disk. Values are per-file oo_score.py --json output. JSON-only commit scoped to voxd/programs -- no blanket make update-oo, other files' baselines untouched.
public Python API exports (VoxClient, VoxClientSync, SynthesisSpec, SynthesizeResult) grow the package __init__ past its version-only stub
extracted _validate_and_infer to remove a duplicated resolve+infer branch (max_complexity 11->9, avg_complexity 5->4); the shared 3-arg helper nudges avg_params 2.5->2.6

CLI first-class (vox-2vto): new 'vox voices' command, post-subcommand --json/--verbose/--quiet routed via _apply_output_flags, and stdin resolution helpers. Typer requires every CLI option as a flat function parameter and cannot bundle them into an object, so avg_params/avg_complexity/module_size growth on this __main__ entry point is unavoidable feature substance.

CLI first-class (vox-2vto): new 'vox voices' command, post-subcommand --json/--verbose/--quiet routed via _apply_output_flags, and stdin resolution helpers. Typer requires every CLI option as a flat function parameter, so avg_params/avg_complexity/module_size growth on this __main__ entry point is unavoidable feature substance.

Extracting the CLI I/O helpers into cli_io.py retires __main__'s module_size relax (1000 -> 904, below the 905 base) and pays down avg_complexity (3.73 -> 3.59). The extraction leaves the param-heavy Typer command functions behind, so avg_params (2.21 -> 2.41) grows -- Typer requires every option as a flat parameter and cannot bundle them into an object.

Adds the error() sibling to emit() so --json error paths emit a structured {error: ...} object on stdout instead of blank stdout plus plain-text stderr. OutputFormatter is a minimal value class with no internal debt to offset the new method's 2 params / 1 branch / ~11 lines, so module_size/avg_params/avg_complexity grow irreducibly.

Extracts _SpeechRequest (per-request wire context: parse plus id-stamped replies) to remove the 16-line SynthesisSpec duplication across both handlers and stop threading 4 loose primitives through the synthesize steps. That third value class trips classes_per_module 2->3 (<=3 ceiling) while breaking the complexity-14 __call__ god-method: max_complexity 14->8, avg_complexity 4.33->2.75, module_size 255->241 all improve.

cli_io is new on this branch; Fix-3 routes its two empty-input error paths through OutputFormatter.error() (for structured --json errors) and restores the full explanatory comment on the mutual-exclusion accumulation that an earlier commit over-compressed. module_size 116->118 records the file's honest size with readable comments.
VoxError base class added so callers can catch one VoxError (bead finding 2)
extracted _decode helper deduplicating the error-frame check across both transport receive paths
export VoxError and the two concrete client exceptions from the public package
extract _expand_parts to share the snake/camel expand-rejoin tail; lowers max and avg complexity
export PromptSet so callers can author program prompts without a non-public import
consumer-facing class docstring plus async context-manager support (aenter/aexit)
consumer-facing class docstring documenting the per-call lifecycle
PEP 562 lazy re-exports: a module __getattr__ replaces eager imports so importing a light voxd.programs value type no longer loads the whole daemon
health/program methods now parse the wire into typed result objects, moving that logic in from the gateway
typed result imports and retyped program/health return signatures
export the four typed client result types (HealthStatus, ProgramStatus, CommandOutcome, ProgramSummary)
CommandOutcome docstring states plainly that the live protocol acks at enqueue and never emits a rejection; the type is kept forward-looking
_outcome docstring states the live protocol acks at enqueue (applied always True) and the parse is forward-looking
wire-parse boundary guard wraps JsonObject ValueError as VoxdProtocolError so every public-method failure is a VoxError
Program.to_status builds its own neutral ProgramStatus view (state+behavior on the domain object), moved off the wire type
module now holds only the mutable PlaybackHealth slot; the fault value types moved to the neutral types_programs.playback_fault
public re-exports consolidated through the neutral types_programs package
consolidated wire-type import from the neutral types_programs package
consolidated wire-type import from the neutral types_programs package

Anchored git-push-ok to git's real push-ref shapes (sha range, [new branch], -> refs/origin) and git-commit to branch+short-sha; the multi-line regex adds 11 lines. Fixes success-marker false positives on paths containing 'main' and on bracket log lines.

Failure-first classification: a structured failure verdict now wins over a masking exit 0 (pytest|tee, make test||true). Unified signal() lowered max_complexity 5->4 and avg 2.75->2.5; module_size +3 for the extra branch and revised docstring.

Added _ContinuousAnnouncement value class deduping the four continuous-mode handlers; classes_per_module 0->1 is unavoidable growth carrying improvements to method_ratio, class_to_func_ratio, avg_complexity, module_size, and max_complexity (silent-failure fix vox-ek1m).

vibe_signals str field swapped for an int vibe_nudge_turns cadence counter plus a VoxConfig.coerce_turns validator; module_size/class_to_func_ratio grow to carry the coercion while method_ratio/avg_params/avg_complexity improve (vox-ek1m)

removed the dead _vibe_signals field and its read property from SessionConfig; method_ratio/avg_params shift mechanically from deleting a zero-arg property while module_size/avg_complexity improve (vox-ek1m)

vibe_cmd routed through VibeChange so CLI and MCP share one transition rule; a transient mid-refactor update recorded 898, current 899 is the accurate post-refactor size and still improves on committed 901 (vox-ek1m)
reject double-quotes in validate_value and add a batch _validate_all guard in write_fields; the validation code and its rationale docstrings grow module_size (+15) and avg_complexity (+0.02)
wrap the vibe config write in try/except so a rejected mood value surfaces as a clean tool error instead of an unhandled crash; +3 lines to module_size
module_size 178->189 carries the _repo_name_for predicate fixing repo-name-from-non-repo-dir; max_complexity 8->6 and avg_complexity 3.22->3.10 paid down via write_fields routing-loop

vox-5aom/g58t: album_tags grows to host vibe normalization (VibeLabel delegation + dual __post_init__ write/query boundary) and auto-name minting (with_auto_name/_dedupe); module_size growth is genuine feature substance, paid down on the same file by max_complexity 6->5, avg_complexity 2.1->2.0, avg_params 1.2->0.93

vox-5aom r2: with_auto_name gains taken-name disambiguation (mint_unique_name) + style-segment floor; TagQuery gains the required exact-empty-vs-wildcard docstring. Genuine feature/clarity substance, paid down on the same file by avg_params 1.2->1.0, max_complexity 6->5, avg_complexity 2.1->2.07
vox-5aom r2: ManifestDraft gains the taken_names field + threading into stamped so the auto-name is disambiguated at the clock-owning seam; genuine structural growth (a carried value), not prose

Honest docstring rewrite of the truncation contract (Copilot: word-boundary promise vs hard-cap reality) plus a non-positive-limit guard grow module_size 71->80; file is new on this branch, well under the 300 cap, and _clip's branch count dropped.
canonicalize name at construction (trim + blank-as-None) so the unique by_name handle is never empty; the None-guard branch and its invariant docstring add module_size/avg_complexity (vox-5aom)

Review-fix adds boundary tag canonicalization (SessionConfig.canonical_tag + 5 call sites) so panel phrase and daemon request agree; grows module_size 736->754 and avg_complexity 2.84->2.85 vs the branch's prior commit but stays a large improvement over main (778/3.02); method_ratio and avg_params improve
MusicPreference gains confirm_started/selected/stopped: the gateway-confirmed register update + [vibe-trace] proof moved here from server.py (fix A ordering)
directive example rewritten to an accurate, executable call (quoted mode, variations placeholder that cannot read as [12]); the styled f-string cannot fit one line so the example wraps
SelectionRequest gains resolved_style/_matches_tags/_single_style: genuine album-genre resolution (PY-OO-5/PY-OO-7) the request owns, growing a pure data-holder into a behavior-bearing value object
music_play grows 2 lines to resolve the actual playing genre from the catalog (id/name replay no longer clears the style); still well below the origin/main module_size baseline

SelectionRequest.resolved_style/_selects/_single_style: genuine album-genre resolution (PY-OO-5/PY-OO-7); complexity improved to 5 vs the intermediate 7, module grows as a data-holder gains the selection behavior it owns
new is_playing predicate: the single audible-gate source of truth shared by MusicHint.for_status and the vibe trace; grows module_size while improving avg_params and avg_complexity

the [vibe-trace] gains a separate hint_emitted field and derives music_playing from the daemon audible gate (status.is_playing); +2 comment/trace lines and one boolean guard, both well under threshold
fail-safe catalog resolution — truthful client state on a successful replay; outermost MCP layer, consistent with this branch's prior server.py relaxes
defensive OSError guard on is_writable + extracted _probe_writable adds required lines
log-injection sanitization: escaping every C0 control char/DEL to guarantee one safe [vibe-trace] line adds irreducible security code; added prose already minimized to essential why

module_size grows to carry the reviewer-requested security + atomicity substance: a private-dir chmod method (0o700 regardless of umask/create-race) plus single-atomic-write short-write surfacing; avg_params and avg_complexity improved in the same change

vox-9po7 correctness fix: split the best-effort dir chmod into a guarded _harden_dir so a PermissionError tightening a writable-but-unowned logs dir no longer aborts the append (status now matches real write behavior). The guard method + its why-docstring grow module_size 141->155 and avg_complexity 1.89->1.90; avg_params improves 0.22->0.20. No prose-only size paydown exists for a 141-line single-class module.

avg_params 0.20->0.29: extracting the private-permissions helpers into PrivateState removed three zero-param methods, raising the remaining-method average; module_size improved 155->135 as the real paydown. Well under the 4.0 threshold.

log-injection escaping of untrusted subprocess stderr (SANITIZER import + escape call + why-comment) unavoidably grows this sink by 5 lines; genuine paydown this change is vibe_trace module_size -14 (sanitize table extracted to log_sanitize.py)

redact vibe/vibe_tags mood text from the durable config log (log length, not content) needs a key-set constant plus an inline branch, +3 lines; this same change nets -25 module_size across vibe_trace/launchd/config/logging_config

doRollover override must loop every backup slot to force 0600 (RotatingFileHandler runs rotate only for base->.1); iterating N slots needs a loop+helper -- the correctness fix the change exists for (vox-q637)
escape table extended to the full C1 range 0x80-0x9F (incl CSI U+009B, an ANSI-escape terminal-corruption vector); +2 logical lines for the security-relevant range (vox-q637)
crash-logging wiring at the composition root: install sys.excepthook + loop exception handler so an uncaught daemon exception reaches voxd.log now that no stderr handler exists (vox-q637)
extract _run_direct_play from try_direct_play cuts its complexity (max_complexity 9->7, avg_complexity 4.44->4.20, method_ratio up); the added method+docstring grows module_size by 5 (vox-q637)
strict stderr_level normalize+validate adds one validation branch (max/avg_complexity 1->2) and 4 lines (module_size 60->64); unavoidable feature substance for vox-q637

vox-cn0p atomic-0600 + startup re-tighten: from_config factory forwards the 4 dictConfig kwargs (avg_params 0->0.8, unavoidable for a mypy-clean factory); new _open/from_config/tighten_existing paths + required rationale docstrings grow the single-class module (module_size 49->91); avg_complexity improved 1.67->1.40 via the shared tighten_existing extraction.

vox-cn0p: wiring the startup-tightening from_config factory needs a named _HANDLER_FACTORY constant (+comment) because the factory dotted path exceeds the line limit at dict indentation; +2 non-blank lines in a plain config module with no improvable metric.

vox-cn0p: wiring the startup-tightening from_config factory needs a named _LOG_HANDLER_FACTORY constant (+comment) because the factory dotted path exceeds the line limit at dict indentation; +2 non-blank lines in the daemon config module with no improvable metric.

vox-cn0p round2 (djb+silent-failure-hunter): O_NOFOLLOW on pre-create + failure-collecting tighten_existing (returns un-tightenable paths) + tighten_failures property. max_complexity 2->4 (sweep: iterate/skip-missing/collect-failures), module_size 91->115 (property + failure logic + rationale docstrings), avg_params 0->0.67 (factory kwargs, prior waiver). avg_complexity stays at main baseline.

vox-cn0p round2: _warn_on_loose_logs surfaces tighten_failures as a post-configure WARNING (durable in the live log). max_complexity 2->4 and avg_complexity 2->3 (handler-filter loop), module_size 64->79 (helper + rationale docstring). avg_params IMPROVED 1.0->0.5 via the extracted helper.

vox-cn0p round2: DaemonConfig._warn_on_loose_logs surfaces tighten_failures as a post-configure WARNING in voxd.log. avg_complexity 2.11->2.21 and module_size 273->290 (new staticmethod + rationale docstring). method_ratio 0.778->0.789 and avg_params IMPROVED by placing the helper as a method, not a free function (PY-OO-7).

vox-cn0p closeout: silent-failure-hunter-requested invariant comment on _open's provisional fchmod suppress (documents that tighten_existing, not this suppress, is the authoritative failure record). module_size 115->120.

TOCTOU fix: _open now opens a single O_NOFOLLOW fd and writes through it via os.fdopen (no reopen an attacker can race); tighten_existing sweeps each slot through an O_NOFOLLOW fd + fstat(S_ISREG) + fchmod (no path-based chmod that follows symlinks), skipping ENOENT and recording ELOOP/EPERM/non-regular. New _tighten helper (cc 5, fd+fstat+fchmod branches) drives max_complexity 4->5, avg_complexity to 2.14, avg_params to 0.71, module_size to 147 (security rationale docstrings). LCOM unaffected.
tighten_failures property now defaults via getattr so reading before the first sweep (delay=True) never raises AttributeError; +2 lines of rationale docstring take module_size 147->149.

DRY: extract the duplicated post-configure warning (isinstance-filter + join + WARNING) from both configure paths into one PrivateRotatingFileHandler.warn_untightened classmethod, deleting both copies. The handler absorbs the shared logic (avg_params 0.71->0.75 for the logger param, avg_complexity ->2.38, module_size ->164); callers shrink (logging_config 79->69, voxd/config 290->277). max_complexity stays 5.

DRY: the duplicated _warn_on_loose_logs moved to PrivateRotatingFileHandler.warn_untightened; deleting the local helper reverts the avg_params that its extraction had improved (back to 1.0, == main, PASS) and shrinks module_size 79->69.

DRY: the duplicated _warn_on_loose_logs staticmethod moved to PrivateRotatingFileHandler.warn_untightened; deleting it reverts method_ratio/avg_params that its presence had improved (back to == main, PASS) and shrinks module_size 290->277.

logging_config becomes the unified logging owner (daemon+client config, log_level, dir re-tighten); module_size 69->131 and max_complexity 2->3 carry that feature substance; avg_params/avg_complexity improved
flush-on-connect/close wiring adds _flush_logs so buffered client logs ship over the real-work socket; module_size +17, avg_complexity +0.02 carry it; avg_params/method_ratio improved
adds the log_level ephemeral config key (D5 debug toggle) with its routing rationale; module_size +5
forward cutover: DaemonConfig.configure_logging + logging constants deleted (module_size -52 paydown); the deletion shifts method_ratio/avg_params/avg_complexity aggregates
registers the daemon-side log-sink handler and switches to configure_daemon_logging; module_size +3
compose AtomicAppendLog: module_size 121->62, max_complexity 4->1, avg_complexity 1.86->1.0 all improve; avg_params +0.04 is an artifact of removing the internal probe methods now shared in the sink
run_server starts the D2 PeriodicFlusher (durable-within-seconds log shipping for the long-lived server); module_size +5 wiring, paid down by the SessionConfig extraction in the noise slice

adds install_bootstrap_excepthook + _handle_bootstrap (routed item 1: capture a crash during logging construction to vox-boot.log via AtomicAppendLog); module_size 64->102, max_complexity 2->5 (still under 10) carry the emergency-landing feature

main() installs the bootstrap excepthook FIRST then upgrades after configure_daemon_logging (routed item 1 boot sequence); the documented two-phase crash-landing grows the composition root by 10 lines

cache HIT/MISS and direct-play INFO rewritten to plain sentences (§5.2); the inline provider/cache-suffix conditionals nudge max_complexity 7->9 (still < 10) while module_size -10 and avg_params -0.1 improve
apply_next becomes the single mode-transition choke point (§4 no-silent-gaps): _mode_label + _log_mode_change add the on-change INFO; +20 module_size carries the observability
symmetric generation-success INFO + permanent-failure WARNING + transient DEBUG (§4 gap: was failure-only); +10 module_size
deduplicated provider-selection INFO + AWS-probe DEBUG (§4 gap: was invisible/swallowed); method_ratio and avg_params improved, avg_complexity +0.04 and module_size +14 carry the reason-tracking
§4 hook gaps: malformed-payload WARNING (byte count only) + config-absent DEBUG lines in the three cwd-None branches; +~20 module_size carries the observability

SessionConfig extraction deferred (removing its methods would lower method_ratio on this procedural MCP module)

H1/M3 concurrency hardening: adds _drain_lock serializing all drainers + _count_lock for the drop-count RMW + bounded snapshot loops (kills the concurrent-drainer IndexError and the fallback re-entrancy livelock); module_size +30 carries the two locks and their contract docs

H2: adds SanitizingFormatter (central escape of the final formatted line so no field can forge a second vox.log line); classes_per_module 1->2, module_size and avg_params carry the new Formatter class
H2: wires the SanitizingFormatter into the daemon file handler (formatter class ref + import); +5 module_size over the unified-owner baseline

L2: from_wire now rejects an unknown role and an out-of-range/non-finite created; the Role literal moved here (the wire schema) as the single source; max_complexity 5->8 (<10), module_size carry the validation
L3: adds O_NOFOLLOW to the append flags (refuse a symlink at the log path, parity with PrivateRotatingFileHandler); +2 module_size for the flag + rationale comment
H2b/M2: fixed 'client' logger (no getLogger(untrusted) cache DoS), origin folded into the message; +5 module_size for the contract docs

per-tool observability via a FastMCP subclass overriding call_tool (the native choke point, not bypassed by __wrapped__); classes_per_module 1->2 and module_size carry it, while method_ratio/class_to_func_ratio/avg_complexity all improve

MED1: _config_level delegates to the shared resolver; +1 module_size over the relaxed baseline

finding 3: start() clears _stop so a stop-before-start / restart actually flushes periodically; +6 module_size for the fix + its contract doc

finding 2: call_tool re-applies the effective log level per tool (+import + call); method_ratio/class_to_func_ratio/avg_complexity still improved

avg_params 0.71->0.75 from the shared _config(name_prefix, level) helper unifying the daemon/client dictConfig; module shrank 153->132 and simplified (avg_complexity 1.86->1.75) by dropping the ship/fallback wiring.
avg_params/module_size grow to carry the injectable tighten-failure reporter (on_failure) that stops the append sink re-entering logging (vox-2594 r2 finding 1); avg_complexity paid down 1.88->1.73.
module_size grows for tighten_existing()/_all_files/_tighten_one — the daemon's durable 0600 sweep of the log+backups+lock (vox-2594 r2 finding 6).

max_complexity/module_size grow to carry the never-raise hardening: encode(backslashreplace) inside the guard (finding 2), rotation stderr note (finding 5), and is_writable covering both the log and the rotate lock via _can_write (finding 8).

avg_complexity rises mechanically because deleting the dead SanitizingFormatter removed its trivial 1-complexity format() method, raising the mean of the remaining LogSanitizer methods; module_size improved (dead code removed, finding 4).
module_size grows for the SinkHealth TypedDict + health() status view (vox-2594 r2 finding 7).
module_size grows to collect directory-tighten failures alongside the file sweep into the one durable daemon WARNING (residual LOW: dir 0700 chmod failures were dropped at pre-dictConfig debug).
module_size +2 from wrapping the reworded durable WARNING ('private permissions on log path(s)') to cover both 0700 dir and 0600 file failures under the 88-col limit.
module_size grows for the lstat-based _can_write + extracted _anchor_writable that reject a symlinked log/lock to match the append open's O_NOFOLLOW (Copilot: health probe must not follow symlinks).
vox-tnum record path-return: RecordResult/output params + integrity check (feature growth)
vox-tnum record path-return: RecordResult/output params + integrity check (feature growth)
vox-tnum record path-return: RecordResult/output params + integrity check (feature growth)
vox-tnum record path-return: RecordResult/output params + integrity check (feature growth)
vox-tnum: handler wiring extracted to HandlerRegistry (module_size -29, avg_params improved)
vox-tnum: RecordHandler split out (module_size -34, classes -1, avg_complexity improved)
vox-tnum r2: wrap CLI stat check for one-line error on inaccessible path
vox-tnum r2: absolute-path resolution + bounded timeout cap
vox-tnum r2: MCP record byte-correct-delivery check
vox-tnum copilot: validate audio 'bytes' as VoxdProtocolError (missing/non-int) instead of silent 0/ValueError
vox-tnum copilot: enforce absolute output_dir/output_path at the wire boundary
vox-tnum copilot: atomic-move fast path split into _move/_copy (avoids a full byte copy for fresh synthesis)
vox-tnum copilot: extract _resolve_sink with a ValueError guard so a malformed wire path is a clean error, not a hang
vox-tnum copilot: _safe_reply returns delivered bool; skip synthesis when client gone before ack
vox-tnum copilot: TOCTOU-safe copy through the mkstemp fd (no reopen by name)
vox-tnum copilot: wrap JSONDecodeError in _decode so a malformed frame is a one-line VoxError
vox-tnum copilot: verify daemon file in its own try; OSError names the real result.path
vox-tnum copilot: fall back to copy only on EXDEV; re-raise other OSErrors from the move
vox-dvri: add recordings_dir() -- the daemon-owned store root; pure additive feature substance (avg_params and avg_complexity improved in the same file)
vox-dvri: register play + fetch ops and wire the shared RecordStore; additive dispatch entries
vox-dvri: inject the RecordStore (DI) -- avg_params rises for a store-owned containment seam; avg_complexity and module_size improved and __call__ complexity fell 9->8 in the same change
vox-dvri: add fetch command + play store/local dispatch + _emit_record_locator; new CLI surface
vox-dvri: add play(ref) and fetch(ref) client methods for the daemon-audio-host surface
vox-dvri: add play/fetch sync facades (additive)
vox-dvri: record tool drops output_dir/output_path for a bare name; removing the _default_output_dir helper raises avg_params of the remaining set
vox-dvri r2: PlaybackResult.ok/failure_detail + per-item outcome future so vox play surfaces host-side failure; method_ratio and avg_params improved same file
vox-dvri r2: play waits for the real playback outcome; fetch byte-count verification
vox-dvri r2: play dispatch-clarity output + locator does not advertise fetch above the frame limit
vox-dvri r2: FETCH_FRAME_LIMIT_BYTES shared constant (additive)
vox-dvri r2: play_handler now awaits the host-side outcome and sends done/error accordingly (the MEDIUM silent-failure fix)
vox-dvri r3: consumer try/finally + _fail_outcome/_failure_result resilience so one raising item cannot hang a client or wedge the queue; method_ratio and avg_params improved same file
vox-dvri live-verify: play_audio returns a failure detail (rc/timeout/no-player/played-nothing) so vox play of a local file exits non-zero; _classify_local_playback extracted
vox-dvri live-verify: play surfaces local-playback failure + prints the store line only after acceptance (past tense)
vox-dvri #353: record-locator identity check (size-match, guarded stat) + empty --name guard; fetch drops the unprovable local-copy shortcut
vox-dvri #353: client.fetch validates 'bytes' is an int; record omits an empty name from the wire
vox-dvri #353: guard stat/read_bytes with OSError -> clean error frame (a race/permission fault is not a server traceback)
vox-dvri #353: guard the stat-vs-read race (declare + limit-check len(raw), not the stale stat); _reject_oversize extracted to dedupe the two rejection sites
vox-dvri #353: fetch validates the reply ref matches the requested ref before writing
vox-dvri #353: _accept skips the pre-ack content-address hash for the no-name path (name-only pre-ack validation)
vox-dvri #353: route sends through shared safe_send + early-return on gone peer
vox-dvri #353: route sends through shared safe_send (disconnect-safe)
vox-dvri #353: resolve distinguishes None (content-address) from empty (reject)
vox-dvri #353: fetch CLI stat moved inside the OSError guard (post-write stat failure = one-line error)
vox-dvri #353: echo the requested ref (case-insensitive fs) instead of path.name
vox-dvri #353: co-locate the shared disconnect-safe safe_send here (the wire-frame helper module) rather than a new functions-only module the ratchet floor forbids
vox-dvri #353: take the pre-read size once (avoid a second racing stat)
vox-dvri #353: preserve an explicit empty wire name so it is rejected, not content-addressed
vox-dvri #353: MCP record uses name-is-not-None so an explicit empty name reaches the daemon (parity with client/CLI); comment expanded
vox-dvri #353: oversize record locator points at the daemon host generically, not the (possibly-tunnel) connection IP
vox-dvri #353: bounded read (open + read limit+1) caps worst-case allocation regardless of the stat-vs-read race (DoS)
vox-dvri #353: safe_send drop-log carries frame type/id via _frame_context so an operator can tell which request lost its reply
vox-dvri #353: record locator human text drops the connection IP (says the daemon); host kept in the JSON payload
vox-dvri #353: consumer finally resolves a pending outcome on cancel/BaseException so a play request cannot hang on shutdown
vox-dvri #353: vox fetch atomic write (temp + os.replace) via _atomic_write_bytes helper
vox-dvri #353: log a warning when play_audio produces a failure detail (detached playback stays diagnosable)
vox-dvri #353: _atomic_write_bytes creates the destination parent so a nested -o path works
vox-dvri #353: dedicated _TIMEOUT_FETCH (generous, for the remote/tunnel one-shot retrieval)
